address:
CREATE TABLE CBSA (
    CBSA integer, -- example: [10300, 10380]
    CBSA_name text, -- example: ['Adrian, MI', 'Aguadilla-Isabela, PR']
    CBSA_type text, -- example: ['Micro', 'Metro']
    PRIMARY KEY (CBSA)
);

CREATE TABLE state (
    abbreviation text, -- example: ['AA', 'AE']
    name text, -- example: ['Armed Forces Americas', 'Armed Forces Europe']
    PRIMARY KEY (abbreviation)
);

CREATE TABLE congress (
    cognress_rep_id text, -- congress representative id, example: ['AK', 'AK-S1']
    first_name text, -- example: ['Young', 'Begich']
    last_name text, -- example: ['Don', 'Mark']
    CID text, -- example: ['N00008091', 'N00009585']
    party text, -- example: ['Republican', 'Democrat']
    state text, -- example: ['Alaska', 'Alabama']
    abbreviation text, -- example: ['AK', 'AL']
    House text, -- example: ['House of Repsentatives', 'Senate']
    District integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    land_area real, -- example: [571951.26, 570641.0]
    PRIMARY KEY (cognress_rep_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_congress_abbreviation FOREIGN KEY (abbreviation) REFERENCES state (abbreviation)
);

CREATE TABLE zip_data (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 544]
    city text, -- example: ['Holtsville', 'Adjuntas']
    state text, -- example: ['NY', 'PR']
    multi_county text, -- multi country, example: ['No', 'Yes']
    type text, -- example: ['Unique Post Office', 'Post Office']
    organization text, -- example: ['I R S Service Center', 'Irs Service Center']
    time_zone text, -- example: ['Eastern', 'Atlantic']
    daylight_savings text, -- example: ['Yes', 'No']
    latitude real, -- example: [40.817923, 40.788827]
    longitude real, -- example: [-73.045317, -73.039405]
    elevation integer, -- example: [25, 0]
    state_fips integer, -- example: [36, 72]
    county_fips integer, -- country fips, example: [103, 1]
    region text, -- example: ['Northeast', 'South']
    division text, -- example: ['Middle Atlantic', 'New England']
    population_2020 integer, -- example: [0, 11737]
    population_2010 integer, -- example: [0, 18570]
    households integer, -- example: [0, 6525]
    avg_house_value integer, -- average house value, example: [0, 86200]
    avg_income_per_household integer, -- average income per household, example: [0, 13092]
    persons_per_household real, -- example: [0.0, 2.84]
    white_population integer, -- example: [0, 17479]
    black_population integer, -- example: [0, 663]
    hispanic_population integer, -- example: [0, 18486]
    asian_population integer, -- example: [0, 7]
    american_indian_population integer, -- example: [0, 113]
    hawaiian_population integer, -- example: [0, 10]
    other_population integer, -- example: [0, 558]
    male_population integer, -- example: [0, 9078]
    female_population integer, -- example: [0, 9492]
    median_age real, -- example: [0.0, 35.9]
    male_median_age real, -- example: [0.0, 34.5]
    female_median_age real, -- example: [0.0, 37.1]
    residential_mailboxes integer, -- example: [0, 4133]
    business_mailboxes integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    total_delivery_receptacles integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    businesses integer, -- example: [2, 0]
    1st_quarter_payroll integer, -- example: [0, 88685000]
    annual_payroll integer, -- example: [0, 376492000]
    employees integer, -- example: [0, 9127]
    water_area real, -- example: [0.0, 0.309]
    land_area real, -- example: [0.0, 64.348]
    single_family_delivery_units integer, -- single-family delivery units, example: [0, 2419]
    multi_family_delivery_units integer, -- multi-family delivery units, example: [0, 1264]
    total_beneficiaries integer, -- example: [0, 5135]
    retired_workers integer, -- example: [0, 2940]
    disabled_workers integer, -- disable workers, example: [0, 885]
    parents_and_widowed integer, -- example: [0, 155]
    spouses integer, -- example: [0, 145]
    children integer, -- example: [0, 1010]
    over_65 integer, -- example: [0, 3245]
    monthly_benefits_all integer, -- example: [0, 6137000]
    monthly_benefits_retired_workers integer, -- example: [0, 4007000]
    monthly_benefits_widowed integer, -- example: [0, 185000]
    CBSA integer, -- example: [35620, 38660]
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_zip_data_state FOREIGN KEY (state) REFERENCES state (abbreviation),
    CONSTRAINT fk_zip_data_cbsa FOREIGN KEY (CBSA) REFERENCES CBSA (CBSA)
);

CREATE TABLE alias (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 544]
    alias text, -- example: ['Holtsville', 'Adjuntas']
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_alias_zip_code FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_data (zip_code)
);

CREATE TABLE area_code (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 544]
    area_code integer, -- example: [631, 787]
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code, area_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_area_code_zip_code FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_data (zip_code)
);

CREATE TABLE avoid (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 544]
    bad_alias text, -- example: ['Internal Revenue Service', 'Colinas Del Gigante']
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code, bad_alias),
    CONSTRAINT fk_avoid_zip_code FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_data (zip_code)
);

CREATE TABLE country (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 544]
    county text, -- country, example: ['SUFFOLK', 'ADJUNTAS']
    state text, -- example: ['NY', 'PR']
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code, county),
    CONSTRAINT fk_country_zip_code FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_data (zip_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_country_state FOREIGN KEY (state) REFERENCES state (abbreviation)
);

CREATE TABLE zip_congress (
    zip_code integer, -- example: [501, 601]
    district text, -- example: ['NY-1', 'PR']
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code, district),
    CONSTRAINT fk_zip_congress_zip_code FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_data (zip_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_zip_congress_district FOREIGN KEY (district) REFERENCES congress (cognress_rep_id)
);
airline:
CREATE TABLE `Air Carriers` (
    Code integer, -- example: [19031, 19032]
    Description text, -- example: ['Mackey International Inc.: MAC', 'Munz Northern Airlines Inc.: XY']
    PRIMARY KEY (Code)
);

CREATE TABLE Airports (
    Code text, -- example: ['01A', '03A']
    Description text, -- example: ['Afognak Lake, AK: Afognak Lake Airport', 'Granite Mountain, AK: Bear Creek Mining ']
    PRIMARY KEY (Code)
);

CREATE TABLE Airlines (
    FL_DATE text, -- flight date, example: ['2018/8/1', '2018/8/2']
    OP_CARRIER_AIRLINE_ID integer, -- operator carrier airline id, example: [19805, 20427]
    TAIL_NUM text, -- tail number, example: ['N956AN', 'N973AN']
    OP_CARRIER_FL_NUM integer, -- operator carrier flight number, example: [1587, 1588]
    ORIGIN_AIRPORT_ID integer, -- example: [12478, 14107]
    ORIGIN_AIRPORT_SEQ_ID integer, -- origin airport sequence id, example: [1247805, 1410702]
    ORIGIN_CITY_MARKET_ID integer, -- example: [31703, 30466]
    ORIGIN text, -- example: ['JFK', 'PHX']
    DEST_AIRPORT_ID integer, -- destination airport id, example: [14107, 11618]
    DEST_AIRPORT_SEQ_ID integer, -- destination airport sequence id, example: [1410702, 1161802]
    DEST_CITY_MARKET_ID integer, -- destination city market id, example: [30466, 31703]
    DEST text, -- destination, example: ['PHX', 'EWR']
    CRS_DEP_TIME integer, -- scheduled local departure time, example: [1640, 1512]
    DEP_TIME integer, -- departure time, example: [1649, 1541]
    DEP_DELAY integer, -- Departure delay, example: [9, 29]
    DEP_DELAY_NEW integer, -- departure delay new, example: [9, 29]
    ARR_TIME integer, -- arrival time, example: [2006, 2350]
    ARR_DELAY integer, -- arrival delay, example: [44, 53]
    ARR_DELAY_NEW integer, -- arrival delay new, example: [44, 53]
    CANCELLED integer, -- example: [0, 1]
    CANCELLATION_CODE text, -- example: ['A', 'B']
    CRS_ELAPSED_TIME integer, -- scheduled elapsed time, example: [342, 285]
    ACTUAL_ELAPSED_TIME integer, -- example: [377, 309]
    CARRIER_DELAY integer, -- example: [9, 0]
    WEATHER_DELAY integer, -- example: [0, 2]
    NAS_DELAY integer, -- National Aviavtion System delay, example: [35, 53]
    SECURITY_DELAY integer, -- example: [0, 42]
    LATE_AIRCRAFT_DELAY integer, -- example: [0, 6]
    CONSTRAINT fk_airlines_op_carrier_airline_id FOREIGN KEY (OP_CARRIER_AIRLINE_ID) REFERENCES `Air Carriers` (Code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_airlines_origin FOREIGN KEY (ORIGIN) REFERENCES Airports (Code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_airlines_dest FOREIGN KEY (DEST) REFERENCES Airports (Code)
);
app_store:
CREATE TABLE playstore (
    App text, -- example: ['Photo Editor & Candy Camera & Grid & Scr', 'Coloring book moana']
    Category text, -- example: ['ART_AND_DESIGN', 'AUTO_AND_VEHICLES']
    Rating real, -- example: [4.1, 3.9]
    Reviews integer, -- example: [159, 967]
    Size text, -- example: ['19M', '14M']
    Installs text, -- example: ['10,000+', '500,000+']
    Type text, -- example: ['Free', 'Paid']
    Price text, -- example: ['0', '$4.99']
    `Content Rating` text, -- example: ['Everyone', 'Teen']
    Genres text, -- example: ['Art & Design', 'Art & Design;Pretend Play']
);

CREATE TABLE user_reviews (
    App text, -- example: ['10 Best Foods for You', '104 找工作 - 找工作 找打工 找兼職 履歷健檢 履歷診療室']
    Translated_Review text, -- example: ["I like eat delicious food. That's I'm co", 'This help eating healthy exercise regula']
    Sentiment text, -- example: ['Positive', 'nan']
    Sentiment_Polarity text, -- example: ['1.0', '0.25']
    Sentiment_Subjectivity text, -- example: ['0.5333333333333333', '0.28846153846153844']
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_app FOREIGN KEY (App) REFERENCES playstore (App)
);
authors:
CREATE TABLE Author (
    Id integer, -- example: [9, 14]
    Name text, -- example: ['Ernest Jordan', 'K. MORIBE']
    Affiliation text, -- example: ['Cavendish Laboratory|Cambridge Universit', 'Department of Molecular Biology|School o']
    PRIMARY KEY (Id)
);

CREATE TABLE Conference (
    Id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    ShortName text, -- example: ['IADIS', 'IADT']
    FullName text, -- example: ['International Association for Developmen', 'Issues and Applications of Database Tech']
    HomePage text, -- example: ['http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/']
    PRIMARY KEY (Id)
);

CREATE TABLE Journal (
    Id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    ShortName text, -- example: ['ICOM', 'AEPIA']
    FullName text, -- example: ['Zeitschrift Für Interaktive Und Kooperat', 'Inteligencia Artificial,revista Iberoame']
    HomePage text, -- example: ['http://www.i-com-media.de', 'http://aepia.dsic.upv.es/revista/']
    PRIMARY KEY (Id)
);

CREATE TABLE Paper (
    Id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    Title text, -- example: ['Stitching videos streamed by mobile phon', 'A nonlocal convection–diffusion equation']
    `Year` integer, -- example: [2009, 2007]
    ConferenceId integer, -- example: [167, 0]
    JournalId integer, -- example: [0, 7234]
    Keyword text, -- example: ['mobile video capturing|real-time|video s', 'Nonlocal diffusion; Convection–diffusion']
    PRIMARY KEY (Id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_paper_conferenceid FOREIGN KEY (ConferenceId) REFERENCES Conference (Id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_paper_journalid FOREIGN KEY (JournalId) REFERENCES Journal (Id)
);

CREATE TABLE PaperAuthor (
    PaperId integer, -- example: [4, 5]
    AuthorId integer, -- example: [1456512, 1102257]
    Name text, -- example: ['ADAM G. JONES', 'Kazuo Iwama']
    Affiliation text, -- example: ['Kyushu University 812 Fukuoka Japan 812 ', 'The french National Institute for Resear']
    CONSTRAINT fk_paperauthor_paperid FOREIGN KEY (PaperId) REFERENCES Paper (Id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_paperauthor_authorid FOREIGN KEY (AuthorId) REFERENCES Author (Id)
);
beer_factory:
CREATE TABLE customers (
    CustomerID integer, -- example: [101811, 103508]
    First text, -- first name, example: ['Kenneth', 'Madeleine']
    Last text, -- last name, example: ['Walton', 'Jones']
    StreetAddress text, -- example: ['6715 Commonwealth Dr', '3603 Leola Way']
    City text, -- example: ['Sacramento', 'Orangevale']
    State text, -- example: ['CA']
    ZipCode integer, -- example: [94256, 94258]
    Email text, -- example: ['walton.k76@fastmail.com', 'j_madeleine@gmail.com']
    PhoneNumber text, -- example: ['(916) 918-1561', '(916) 186-9423']
    FirstPurchaseDate date, -- example: ['2013-05-30', '2013-02-06']
    SubscribedToEmailList text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    Gender text, -- example: ['M', 'F']
    PRIMARY KEY (CustomerID)
);

CREATE TABLE geolocation (
    LocationID integer, -- example: [0, 1]
    Latitude real, -- example: [0.0, 38.566129]
    Longitude real, -- example: [0.0, -121.426432]
    PRIMARY KEY (LocationID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_locationid FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES location (LocationID)
);

CREATE TABLE location (
    LocationID integer, -- example: [0, 1]
    LocationName text, -- example: ['LOST', 'Sac State American River Courtyard']
    StreetAddress text, -- example: ['6000 J St']
    City text, -- example: ['Sacramento']
    State text, -- example: ['CA']
    ZipCode integer, -- example: [95819]
    PRIMARY KEY (LocationID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_location_locationid FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES geolocation (LocationID)
);

CREATE TABLE rootbeerbrand (
    BrandID integer, -- example: [10001, 10002]
    BrandName text, -- example: ['A&W', 'A.J. Stephans']
    FirstBrewedYear integer, -- example: [1919, 1926]
    BreweryName text, -- example: ['Dr Pepper Snapple Group', 'AJ Stephans Beverages']
    City text, -- example: ['Lodi', 'Fall River']
    State text, -- example: ['CA', 'MA']
    Country text, -- example: ['United States', 'Australia']
    Description text, -- example: ['After setting up the first A&W Root Beer', 'AJ Stephans Company makes \nthe finest el']
    CaneSugar text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    CornSyrup text, -- example: ['TRUE', 'FALSE']
    Honey text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    ArtificialSweetener text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    Caffeinated text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    Alcoholic text, -- example: ['FALSE']
    AvailableInCans text, -- example: ['TRUE', 'FALSE']
    AvailableInBottles text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    AvailableInKegs text, -- example: ['FALSE', 'TRUE']
    Website text, -- example: ['http://www.rootbeer.com/', 'http://www.ajstephans.com/']
    FacebookPage text, -- example: ['https://www.facebook.com/Dads-Old-Fashio', 'https://www.facebook.com/Dog-N-Suds-Bott']
    Twitter text, -- example: ['https://twitter.com/ilovedads', 'https://twitter.com/1919rootbeer']
    WholesaleCost real, -- example: [0.42, 0.98]
    CurrentRetailPrice real, -- example: [1.0, 3.0]
    PRIMARY KEY (BrandID)
);

CREATE TABLE rootbeer (
    RootBeerID integer, -- example: [100000, 100001]
    BrandID integer, -- example: [10001, 10002]
    ContainerType text, -- example: ['Bottle', 'Can']
    LocationID integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    PurchaseDate date, -- example: ['2015-07-03', '2016-05-09']
    PRIMARY KEY (RootBeerID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_rootbeer_brandid FOREIGN KEY (BrandID) REFERENCES rootbeerbrand (BrandID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_rootbeer_locationid FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES location (LocationID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_rootbeer_locationid FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES geolocation (LocationID)
);

CREATE TABLE rootbeerreview (
    CustomerID integer, -- example: [101811, 105549]
    BrandID integer, -- example: [10012, 10014]
    StarRating integer, -- example: [5, 1]
    ReviewDate date, -- example: ['2013-07-15', '2013-07-08']
    Review text, -- example: ['You could have done better Sactown.', 'Too much bite, not enough barq.']
    PRIMARY KEY (CustomerID, BrandID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_rootbeerreview_customerid FOREIGN KEY (CustomerID) REFERENCES customers (CustomerID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_rootbeerreview_brandid FOREIGN KEY (BrandID) REFERENCES rootbeerbrand (BrandID)
);

CREATE TABLE transaction (
    TransactionID integer, -- example: [100000, 100001]
    CreditCardNumber integer, -- example: [6011583832864739, 4716634257568793]
    CustomerID integer, -- example: [864896, 610766]
    TransactionDate date, -- example: ['2014-07-07', '2014-07-13']
    CreditCardType text, -- example: ['Discover', 'Visa']
    LocationID integer, -- example: [2, 1]
    RootBeerID integer, -- example: [105661, 105798]
    PurchasePrice real, -- example: [3.0, 1.0]
    PRIMARY KEY (TransactionID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_customerid FOREIGN KEY (CustomerID) REFERENCES customers (CustomerID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_locationid FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES location (LocationID),
    CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_rootbeerid FOREIGN KEY (RootBeerID) REFERENCES rootbeer (RootBeerID)
);
bike_share_1:
CREATE TABLE station (
    id integer, -- example: [2, 3]
    name text, -- example: ['San Jose Diridon Caltrain Station', 'San Jose Civic Center']
    lat real, -- latitude, example: [37.329732, 37.330698]
    long real, -- longitude, example: [-121.90178200000001, -121.888979]
    dock_count integer, -- example: [27, 15]
    city text, -- example: ['San Jose', 'Redwood City']
    installation_date text, -- example: ['8/6/2013', '8/5/2013']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE status (
    station_id integer, -- example: [2, 3]
    bikes_available integer, -- example: [2, 3]
    docks_available integer, -- example: [25, 24]
    `time` text, -- example: ['2013/08/29 12:06:01', '2013/08/29 12:07:01']
);

CREATE TABLE trip (
    id integer, -- example: [4069, 4073]
    duration integer, -- example: [174, 1067]
    start_date text, -- example: ['8/29/2013 9:08', '8/29/2013 9:24']
    start_station_name text, -- example: ['2nd at South Park', 'South Van Ness at Market']
    start_station_id integer, -- example: [64, 66]
    end_date text, -- example: ['8/29/2013 9:11', '8/29/2013 9:42']
    end_station_name text, -- example: ['2nd at South Park', 'San Francisco Caltrain 2 (330 Townsend)']
    end_station_id integer, -- example: [64, 69]
    bike_id integer, -- example: [288, 321]
    subscription_type text, -- example: ['Subscriber', 'Customer']
    zip_code integer, -- example: [94114, 94703]
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE weather (
    `date` text, -- example: ['8/29/2013', '8/30/2013']
    max_temperature_f integer, -- max temperature in Fahrenheit degree, example: [74, 78]
    mean_temperature_f integer, -- mean temperature in Fahrenheit degree, example: [68, 69]
    min_temperature_f integer, -- min temperature in Fahrenheit degree, example: [61, 60]
    max_dew_point_f integer, -- max dew point in Fahrenheit degree, example: [61, 57]
    mean_dew_point_f integer, -- mean dew point in Fahrenheit degree, example: [58, 56]
    min_dew_point_f integer, -- min dew point in Fahrenheit degree, example: [56, 54]
    max_humidity integer, -- example: [93, 90]
    mean_humidity integer, -- example: [75, 70]
    min_humidity integer, -- example: [57, 50]
    max_sea_level_pressure_inches real, -- max sea level pressure in inches, example: [30.07, 30.05]
    mean_sea_level_pressure_inches real, -- mean sea level pressure in inches, example: [30.02, 30.0]
    min_sea_level_pressure_inches real, -- min sea level pressure in inches, example: [29.97, 29.93]
    max_visibility_miles integer, -- max visibility in miles, example: [10, 9]
    mean_visibility_miles integer, -- mean visibility in miles, example: [10, 9]
    min_visibility_miles integer, -- min visibility in miles, example: [10, 7]
    max_wind_Speed_mph integer, -- max wind Speed in mph, example: [23, 29]
    mean_wind_speed_mph integer, -- mean wind Speed in mph, example: [11, 13]
    max_gust_speed_mph integer, -- max gust Speed in mph, example: [28, 35]
    precipitation_inches text, -- precipitation in inches, example: ['0', '0.23']
    cloud_cover integer, -- example: [4, 2]
    events text, -- example: ['Fog', 'Rain']
    wind_dir_degrees integer, -- wind direction degrees, example: [286, 291]
    zip_code text, -- example: ['94107', '94063']
);
book_publishing_company:
CREATE TABLE authors (
    au_id text, -- author id, example: ['172-32-1176', '213-46-8915']
    au_lname text, -- author last name, example: ['White', 'Green']
    au_fname text, -- author first name, example: ['Johnson', 'Marjorie']
    phone text, -- example: ['408 496-7223', '415 986-7020']
    address text, -- example: ['10932 Bigge Rd.', '309 63rd St. #411']
    city text, -- example: ['Menlo Park', 'Oakland']
    state text, -- example: ['CA', 'KS']
    zip text, -- example: ['94025', '94618']
    contract text, -- example: ['0']
    PRIMARY KEY (au_id)
);

CREATE TABLE jobs (
    job_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    job_desc text, -- job description, example: ['New Hire - Job not specified', 'Chief Executive Officer']
    min_lvl integer, -- min level, example: [10, 200]
    max_lvl integer, -- max level, example: [10, 250]
    PRIMARY KEY (job_id)
);

CREATE TABLE publishers (
    pub_id text, -- publisher id, example: ['0736', '0877']
    pub_name text, -- publisher name, example: ['New Moon Books', 'Binnet & Hardley']
    city text, -- example: ['Boston', 'Washington']
    state text, -- example: ['MA', 'DC']
    country text, -- example: ['USA', 'Germany']
    PRIMARY KEY (pub_id)
);

CREATE TABLE employee (
    emp_id text, -- employee id, example: ['A-C71970F', 'A-R89858F']
    fname text, -- first name, example: ['Aria', 'Annette']
    minit text, -- example: ['M', 'R']
    lname text, -- last name, example: ['Cruz', 'Roulet']
    job_id integer, -- example: [10, 6]
    job_lvl integer, -- job level, example: [87, 152]
    pub_id text, -- publisher id, example: ['1389', '9999']
    hire_date datetime, -- example: ['1991-10-26 00:00:00.0', '1990-02-21 00:00:00.0']
    PRIMARY KEY (emp_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_id FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs (job_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_employee_pub_id FOREIGN KEY (pub_id) REFERENCES publishers (pub_id)
);

CREATE TABLE pub_info (
    pub_id text, -- publication id, example: ['0877', '1389']
    logo blob, -- example: ['0x4749463839618B002F00B30F00000000800000', '0x474946383961C2001D00B30F00000000800000']
    pr_info text, -- publisher's information, example: ['This is sample text data for Binnet & Ha', 'This is sample text data for Algodata In']
    PRIMARY KEY (pub_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_pub_info_pub_id FOREIGN KEY (pub_id) REFERENCES publishers (pub_id)
);

CREATE TABLE stores (
    stor_id text, -- store id, example: ['6380', '7066']
    stor_name text, -- store name, example: ['Eric the Read Books', "Barnum's"]
    stor_address text, -- store address, example: ['788 Catamaugus Ave.', '567 Pasadena Ave.']
    city text, -- example: ['Seattle', 'Tustin']
    state text, -- example: ['WA', 'CA']
    zip text, -- example: ['98056', '92789']
    PRIMARY KEY (stor_id)
);

CREATE TABLE discounts (
    discounttype text, -- example: ['Initial Customer', 'Volume Discount']
    stor_id text, -- store id, example: ['8042']
    lowqty integer, -- low quantity, example: [100]
